value.rationale: The fetched page is entirely about the "Record & Replay" feature in OpenAI's Codex product, which allows users to demonstrate a workflow on a Mac and turn it into a reusable skill. The page contains no mention whatsoever of cost tracking, usage tracking, token spend tracking, spending caps, or any related billing/usage management features. Therefore, the claim that OpenAI offers "Cost & usage tracking (Track and cap token spend / usage)" is not substantiated by this page.
